msg: PLANNED iter002_bv64_threads64: Increase BV from 32 to 64 to reduce block count and use 64 threads/block to better utilize warps
PLANNED iter003_bv128_128threads: Increase BV to 128 (full V dimension), use 128 threads per block, single block per NV slice
PLANNED iter004_threads256: Increase to 256 threads/block for more work per block and better warp scheduling
PLANNED iter005_doublebuf: Add double buffering with async copy to overlap memory loads with computation
PLANNED iter006_vec2load: Use vectorized __half2 loads and stores to improve memory bandwidth utilization
PLANNED iter007_unroll2: Process 2 timesteps per iteration to increase arithmetic intensity and hide latency
PLANNED iter008_reg64: Reduce register pressure by limiting max registers to 64 per thread via nvcc flag
PLANNED iter009_warp4: Use 4 warps (128 threads) with better warp-level reduction pattern
PLANNED iter101_warp32_2d: Switch to 2D thread layout (4x8=32 threads) with each thread holding 32x4 h values. Matches gdn_bf16_handwritten.cu which achieves 0.013ms.
PLANNED iter102_prefetch_qkv: Prefetch q,k,v for next timestep while computing current. Hide memory latency in recurrent loop. Also add launch_bounds to improve occupancy.
PLANNED iter103_forceinline: Add __forceinline__ to computation function to eliminate function call overhead. Use fast math intrinsics for exp/log.
PLANNED iter104_regonly: Use warp shuffle for all reductions instead of shared memory. Only 32 threads = 1 warp, so shuffle is sufficient. Eliminates shared memory latency.
PLANNED iter105_threads64: Use 64 threads (2 warps) with 2x16 V-thread layout. Each thread handles 8x4 h values. More parallelism per block for better latency hiding.
PLANNED iter106_bv32_4blocks: Change blocking to BV=32 (4 blocks per V dimension). This matches reference kernel which achieves 0.012ms. Increases block count from 16 to 64, improving SM occupancy.
PLANNED iter107_vec2_loads: Use float2 vectorized loads for q, k, v. Load 2 half values at once, convert to float2. Reduces load instructions.
PLANNED iter108_unroll_full: Full unroll of h matrix operations. Use #pragma unroll with explicit factors and manual outer loop unroll.
